drivers.notes: D2415K dual-diaphragm compression driver with Sonoglass HDI waveguide horn

description.en: Large two-way studio monitor with 300 mm JW300PG-8 Pure Pulp cone woofer crossed at 1.5 kHz to a D2415K 38 mm Annular Ring Teonex compression driver in a Sonoglass HDI horn. V-braced front-ported cabinet with baffle-mounted HF and UHF tone attenuators (±1 dB in 0.5 dB steps), pairs with the JS-120 matching stand for floor placement.
description.es: Monitor de estudio grande de dos vías con woofer Pure Pulp JW300PG-8 de 300 mm cruzando a 1.5 kHz con un driver de compresión D2415K de 38 mm con diafragma Annular Ring Teonex en bocina Sonoglass HDI. Cabinet front-ported V-braced con atenuadores HF y UHF en el bafle (±1 dB en pasos de 0.5 dB), se acopla con el stand JS-120 para uso en piso.
